summary: Aalto offers open courses and lifelong learning beyond degree programs.
title: Open Learning for All

narration.script: Open Learning for All. Aalto offers open courses and lifelong learning beyond degree programs. Open Route: People can take individual courses without joining a degree program. Adult Learning: Lifewide Learning focuses on skills for changing work. Who can join: Open University is open regardless of background or age.
